{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/35772301?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/fg0x0", "id": 35772301, "login": "fg0x0", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM1NzcyMzAx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47376", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary

The password-reset page rendered the URL token directly into a JavaScript string literal in a server-rendered EJS template. EJS `<%= %>` HTML-entity-encodes a fixed set of characters but does not escape single quotes or backslashes, so a crafted token could break out of the JS string context and execute attacker-controlled script in the NocoDB origin. Triggering required only that a victim follow a malicious password-reset link.

### Details

The vulnerable template embedded the token as:

```ejs
token: '<%= token %>',
```

A token containing `';alert(document.cookie);//` closes the single-quoted string and runs arbitrary JavaScript. The fix moves the token into an HTML attribute (`data-token="…"`) and reads it from `dataset.token` at runtime, so EJS's HTML-entity escaping is sufficient.

### Impact

- Reflected XSS in the NocoDB origin via a phished password-reset URL.
- No authentication required to trigger; affects any user who clicks the crafted link.
- Same-origin script can read auth state and act on the victim's behalf.

### Credit

This issue was reported by [@fg0x0](https://github.com/fg0x0).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00262, "percentile": 0.17591}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6xcx-7qmg-vjfq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T15:59:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6xcx-7qmg-vjfq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6xcx-7qmg-vjfq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47376"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T15:59:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-6xcx-7qmg-vjfq", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.04.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6xcx-7qmg-vjfq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-6xcx-7qmg-vjfq", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via Password Reset Token", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T15:59:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6xcx-7qmg-vjfq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.04.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.04.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via Password Reset Token
